title: engelhardia serrata var. parvifolia
intro: Engelhardia serrata var. parvifolia is a plant species, also known as the small-leaved Engelhardia, which belongs to the family Juglandaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Engelhardia serrata var. parvifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its leaves and bark can be dried and used to make infusions or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
